validation.notes: Favicon URL is a remote URL; the local-favicon ENOENT message from the validator is non-blocking and does not fail the build.

outstandingNotes: framework/cross-cutting/caching.mdx is 173 lines (deep target floor 180); content density is high — Redis provider, hybrid cache, tenant-prefixed key layout, UoW staging. Padding would dilute, so left as-is.
framework/core/aspects-and-interceptors.mdx and exception-handling.mdx remain slightly above their original standard band (296L/270L); accuracy verified; trimming would mutilate tables/code excerpts.
